description_long: This is a modern residential house surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, creating a secluded and private environment. The house features a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear design with large glass panels and clean lines. The exterior appears to be finished in a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco and glass, with some metallic or wooden accents. The property includes a manicured lawn and landscaped areas, with a driveway or path leading to the main entrance. The windows are generously sized and arranged in horizontal bands, maximizing natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The overall setting suggests a contemporary architectural style focused on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped grounds. The design emphasizes privacy, clean lines, and integration with nature.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the house centrally enclosed by a thick perimeter of trees, highlighting the secluded setting and the flat roof structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the main facade with large horizontal windows, a visible entryway, and landscaped lawn extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more glass surfaces, and the dense tree coverage wrapping around the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a secondary structure or garage, and the continuation of the tree barrier.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a minimalist door, no visible porch, and a direct path from the landscaped lawn; clean, understated design with no ornate features.
